title: ourisia alpina
intro: Ourisia alpina, also known as Alpine Forget-me-not, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand and Australia, characterized by its vibrant blue flowers and delicate, hairy leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ourisia alpina include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. Ourisia alpina is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications for skin issues and wounds.
